message:
🐛 fix(gpu): track Intel and Gaudi GPU requests in pod resource views (Issue 9090) (#9204)

GetPods in pkg/k8s/client_resources.go reported GPURequested=0 for any
pod requesting Intel (gpu.intel.com/i915) or Habana/Gaudi
(habana.ai/gaudi, habana.ai/gaudi2, intel.com/gaudi) accelerators,
because the resource-name check only matched nvidia.com/gpu and
amd.com/gpu. The node-inventory tracker in client_gpu.go already
handles all six names, so pod views were inconsistent with node views.

Extract the full list into a package-level gpuResourceNames slice and
an isGPUResourceName helper. Both request and limit loops now consult
the same list, so the two code paths can't drift.

Reported by @Pranjal6955.

Fixes #9090

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
